paper_title: Algebraic Determination of Spectral Characteristics of Rovibrational States of Diatomic Molecules. II. Analysis of the Vibration-Rotation Interaction by Means of the Factorization Method

methods.description: This method involves the algebraic determination of spectral characteristics of rovibrational states in diatomic molecules, focusing on the analysis of vibration-rotation interaction using the factorization method.

steps.description: Apply the factorization method to the Hamiltonian of the diatomic molecule to separate vibrational and rotational components.
steps.searchable_summary: factorize Hamiltonian to separate vibrational and rotational components

steps.description: Analyze the separated components to determine the spectral characteristics of the rovibrational states.
steps.searchable_summary: analyze components to determine spectral characteristics
